arts.ttl: Chelsea defender Ben Chilwell set to undergo medical at Crystal Palace ahead of six-month loan move to the Eagles
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Ben Chilwell will have a medical tomorrow at Crystal Palace once the final details are ironed out on a six month loan deal.

arts.ttl: 'Constant threat' - how Mateta caused Man Utd problems
arts.sum: MOTD2 pundits Danny Murphy and Theo Walcott explain how Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta was a "constant threat" in his side's 2-0 Premier League win over Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Palace believed 'great win' would happen - Glasner
arts.sum: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner says his side believed that their "great win" would happen against Manchester United at Old Trafford in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford breaks his silence on leaving Man United for Aston Villa on loan and reveals why he joined Unai Emery's side
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has broken his silence on leaving boyhood club Manchester United after his completing his loan move to Aston Villa, 24 hours out from the winter deadline.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville gives his verdict on Marcus Rashford's loan move to Aston Villa as pundit reveals why he believes the switch will benefit wantaway Man United star
arts.sum: Gary Neville weighed in on Marcus Rashford's loan move to Aston Villa, after it was officially announced that he would leave Man United and join Unai Emery's side until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Palace agree deal with Chelsea for Chilwell loan
arts.sum: Crystal Palace have agreed a deal with Chelsea to sign Ben Chilwell on loan for rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford leaves Manchester United as Aston Villa complete ambitious loan move
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has officially departed Manchester United to join Aston Villa on-loan. The 27-year-old burst onto the scene at Old Trafford in 2016, scoring twice in consecutive...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa sign Rashford on loan from Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford has joined Aston Villa on loan for the remainder of the season. Rashford has made 15 Premier League appearances for Man Utd this season, scoring in head coach Ruben Amorim ’s first match - a 1-1 draw at Ipswich Town on 24 November - before adding two more in a 4-0 win over Everton a week later.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford breaks silence on Aston Villa transfer and sends farewell wish to Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United and England forward Marcus Rashford will spend the rest of the season at Aston Villa, with both clubs and the player confirming the move on Sunday

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford joins Aston Villa on loan from Manchester United
arts.sum: Rashford will spend the rest of the season with Villa.
